WITH seg_pct AS (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          ((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
            SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END))
          / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
   FROM yearmonth ym
   JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
   GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT Segment, pct_inc FROM seg_pct ORDER BY pct_inc DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_inc FROM seg_pct ORDER BY pct_inc ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
